title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.11 - Base debuff card tooltips (e.g. Weak on Freeze Up) now show BOTH Invertible and Swappable, matching the power icon; Invertible and Swappable are handled by one shared mechanism. Also fixes Shaken showing Invertible twice on Go For Broke.
